name: Demaciains AI Tools
description: 17 pay-per-use API tools for AI agents — premium analysis at $2.44, standard intelligence at $1.39. Powered by x402 protocol on Base network.

capabilities.name: ai-detector
capabilities.description: AI content detection — analyzes text for AI-generated patterns using burstiness, vocabulary diversity, and sentence structure analysis

capabilities.name: email-verify
capabilities.description: Email verification with real DNS/MX record checks, deliverability scoring, disposable/free/corporate detection

capabilities.name: company-enrich
capabilities.description: Company enrichment via web research — firmographics, competitors, industry, size estimation

capabilities.name: web-intel
capabilities.description: Web intelligence — page analysis, title/description extraction, SEO signals, indexation check

capabilities.name: plagiarism
capabilities.description: Plagiarism detection via text fingerprinting — originality scoring, n-gram analysis, similarity detection

capabilities.name: seo-audit
capabilities.description: SEO audit — technical + on-page analysis: title, meta, H1, images, links, with severity-ranked issues

capabilities.name: lead-score
capabilities.description: B2B lead scoring — ICP fit analysis based on email quality, job title seniority, company match, industry

capabilities.name: market-gap
capabilities.description: Market gap analysis — find underserved niches with revenue estimates and validation signals

capabilities.name: trends
capabilities.description: Market trends — growth signals for hot sectors including AI, SaaS, creator economy

capabilities.name: competitor-gap
capabilities.description: Competitor gap analysis — weaknesses to exploit with pricing comparison

capabilities.name: algo-report
capabilities.description: Social platform algorithm report — ranking signals and optimization hacks for IG/TikTok/YT/LinkedIn/X

capabilities.name: startup-validator
capabilities.description: Startup idea validator — multi-dimension scoring with BUILD/PROMISING/HIGH RISK verdict

capabilities.name: domain-intel
capabilities.description: Domain intelligence — brandability score, SEO potential, TLD authority, value estimate

capabilities.name: prompt-optimize
capabilities.description: Prompt optimizer — scores your prompt, identifies issues, returns optimized version with best practices

capabilities.name: content-score
capabilities.description: Content scoring — readability, SEO metrics, word/sentence analysis

capabilities.name: price-benchmark
capabilities.description: SaaS price benchmark — tier pricing analysis by category with MRR estimates

capabilities.name: name-generator
capabilities.description: Business/product name generator — brandable names with domain availability hints
